notableEvents.label: Josh Lowe pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Josh Lowe grounds out, shortstop Darell Hernaiz to first baseman Nick Kurtz.

notableEvents.label: Josh Lowe pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Josh Lowe doubles (2) on a line drive to left fielder Tyler Soderstrom. Nolan Schanuel scores. Logan O'Hoppe scores.

notableEvents.label: Tyler Soderstrom pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Soderstrom flies out to left fielder Jose Siri in foul territory.

notableEvents.label: Tyler Soderstrom pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Soderstrom grounds out sharply, second baseman Oswald Peraza to first baseman Nolan Schanuel. Nick Kurtz to 3rd.
